title: API Key Create Request
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/keys — create a new API key for the authenticated user. Scopes must be user-requestable tokens from the canonical vocabulary; admin:all is reserved for privileged server-side flows.

name.description: Human-readable label for the key. Must be unique within the user account.

project_id.description: Optional project to scope the key to. When null the key is tenant-scoped.

scopes.description: Space-delimited set of user-requestable scope tokens. admin:all is not allowed here.

expires_at.description: Optional expiry date-time (ISO 8601). When null the key does not expire.
